title: Lemon's Poop
description: Adds functional poop to Minecraft for fertilizing and more.
body:
![poop](https://i.imgur.com/wdV1ItA.png)
![bar3](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
Ever felt like Minecraft was missing something... natural? Well, worry no more! Lemon’s Poop for NeoForge 1.21.1 brings the wonderful world of 💩 to your blocky adventures! Feed your animals, and in return, they’ll gift you some fresh poop—circle of life, right? Use it to fertilize crops, craft some truly questionable decorations, and even build your very own Poop Golem—because why should snow have all the fun? Whether you're flinging it, placing it, or worshipping it (no judgment), this mod adds a fresh, earthy touch to your world.

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

This mod was custom made for a server member on my discord, if you have an idea for a mod tell me about it by going to my website and clicking the discord link. If I end up liking it I might make the mod for you (before I get too many requests too keep track of)

![bar2](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
